title: NICE newsletters and alerts | NICE
text:
s. Subscribe for information on the work of NICE International, our contribution to world-leading methods research, joint-working requests and events. 
Medicines awareness service 
Our daily or weekly email alert service provides evidence-based information on medicines and prescribing. You can tailor the alerts you receive based on your specialities of interest. 
Recent editions NICE news for health and social care December 2025

August 2025 
Patients to receive medicines 3 to 6 months faster.
